text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Unity Cup's third preseason match
behind us, not only has our teamwork improved,
but each individual member's skills have also
grown significantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, there is one major problem—the team
as a whole has begun to lose its confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And I think I know the reason why...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Time for your running drills. Get into starting
positions within 30 seconds.

text_block_list.name: Team Zenith
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Huff... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The fundamentals are important for a reason. I
want you all to be conscious of what you're trying
to improve and train with intention.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
1,000 meters left! Your pace is slowing! Raise the
cadence of your steps!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Your form's becoming sloppy! Straighten up from
your core and go faster! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Y-yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto's training is so intense that there's
barely any time for her team to breathe, much
less engage in idle chitchat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, Team Zenith is completing all their
exercises with fervor.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! They're really giving it their all!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's almost scary seeing how serious they are...
Can we really beat them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith's training is terrifying in more ways
than one, and the mere sight of them practicing
has sent more than a few Umamusume into
despair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We haven't been slacking off either, though.
After all the work we've done, I'm pretty sure we
could hold our own against them.
choice_data_list:
(I need to rebuild the team's confidence before
the big race!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: You wish for our teams to have a practice match?
choice_data_list: I think it would be good training!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If I recall, we've competed against you once
already, albeit in an unofficial capacity.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But I think this would be a good opportunity to
see how far both teams have come. Very well, I
accept.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We discuss a few more details and wrap things up,
but just as Ms. Kashimoto makes to leave...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I couldn't help but overhear! It's been a
while—haven't seen you since our unofficial
match!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
You want to race against us again? Wasn't the
last time enough of a lesson?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
You're the ones who prioritized fun and freedom
over actual improvement. Say what you want, but
I bet your team's still slow as molasses.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Sorry, please just ignore her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon's words are beyond acrid, but I can't
really fault her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how brutal their training is under Ms.
Kashimoto, it's only natural for her to feel
resentful toward teams with looser schedules.
Still...
choice_data_list: Are you really happy being micromanaged?
Are you really happy being micromanaged?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Almost all the students are against Ms.
Kashimoto's restrictive methods, so it strikes me
as odd how willingly Team Zenith accepts them.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I don't really care. As long as I can get faster, it
doesn't matter if what I'm subjected to is fun or
not.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kashimoto can be harsh, but she gets the
job done. I trust her methods.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I agree!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd already suspected it from observing their
training, but it seems the members of Team
Zenith really do all look up to Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A p-p-practice match against Team Zenith?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But they completely steamrolled us the last time
we raced them!
choice_data_list: We're not the same as we were then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell them to have more confidence in themselves
and that we'll definitely be able to hold our
ground against Team Zenith this time.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn tootin'! You said it! We're more close-knit
an' a better team than ever now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! Very well! I know I have all of you to lean
on, so I'll do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, our days of training for the practice
match begin!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Rice, your pace's droppin'! Pick it back up!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: 278, 279, 280! Just a little bit more, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Um... Uh-oh, what number were we on again?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uh... I don't remember!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I'm terrified just thinking about the prospect of losing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... I actually feel really nervous too...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oho! That makes us two peas in a pod, Rice! How
nice it is that we're both feeling the same way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have an idea. Why don't we cast some
confidence-inducing spells on ourselves?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Wow! I ran a new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And, um... I wanted to say that training has been
really fun recently.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everyone doing their best makes me want
to work harder too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's strength grows steadily as they all
work together, lend each other support, and
engage in the occasional friendly competition.
